---
title: "Margaret Evans"
---

## Margaret Evans

**Dates:** (1848-11 March 1893)

**Maiden name:** (Freeman)

### Description

eldest daughter of Edward Augustus Freeman

### Biography

She married (1878) Sir Arthur John Evans (1851-1941), archaeologist [ODNB Freeman and  Evans]; she contributed to <i>MP</i> (1882).  Either she, or possibly her sister Florence, took part in the Spider competitions under the name ‘Pisa’.

### Letters

- Letter from May 10th [1874]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
